summary: Completed testing of avatar system with Ready Player Me integration and Visual Studio ComfyUI/SD features. All requested features are working: avatar model selector with RPM default, texture URL field, Visual Studio with default workflow, ComfyUI load button, and status badges.

minor_issues.issue: Test expected 502 but got 200 - LM Studio may be working
minor_issues.impact: Positive - story bible generation working when expected offline

integration_issues.issue: Dashboard service health panel shows 'No services detected yet' initially

passed_tests: Avatar model selector loads Ready Player Me 'Gothic Lillith' default option
Avatar texture URL field accepts input without crashing
Visual Studio page loads with ComfyUI and SD panels
ComfyUI workflow shows default content with proper JSON structure
ComfyUI 'Load default workflow' button is clickable and functional
Service status badges show 'UNKNOWN' status correctly for offline services
Backend Services API lists ComfyUI, LM Studio, and Stable Diffusion
Backend ComfyUI endpoint returns proper 502 when service offline
Backend Stable Diffusion endpoint returns proper 502 when service offline
Navigation between Command Deck and Visual Studio working
All avatar customization controls functional (emotion, environment, character)
